incident_details.short_description: Regarding lookup filter throws setEntityTypes error on Phone Call form
incident_details.description: When users open a Phone Call activity, the browser console shows 'setEntityTypes is not a function' and the Regarding lookup is not filtered to Accounts and Users as expected.

resolution.root_cause: The script used a lookup control method that was not supported for the activity party/Regarding lookup scenario and was registered on the wrong event.
resolution_steps: Reproduced the script error on the Phone Call form.
Confirmed the Regarding field control type and removed the unsupported setEntityTypes call.
Registered a supported pre-search filter for the lookup instead of changing entity types at runtime.
Added guards to check that the control exists before applying the filter.
Published the updated JavaScript web resource and verified the lookup filter applied without console errors.

source_inspiration.title: Regarding field filtering JavaScript error discussion
